sections.title: If the player is a house guest

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: I KILL YOU!!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, [House owner] kill you!

sections.title: If the player is the house owner

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: I KILL YOU!!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I kill you!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: UUUHRG! Now I kill you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you going to do that? You're just a head on a wall!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Uhhhhrrr...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you so violent?

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: You kill me! Uuurgh! That make me angry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seemed pretty angry before I killed you!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: I like angry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry I killed you.

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: I hate sorry! Makes me more angry! WANT TO KILL YOU!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please try to calm down!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Hate calm! Smash it! Hur hur hur!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not really sorry!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: That make me more angry! Uuuurgh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything that doesn't make you angry?

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: No! I like angry! Hur hur hur!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I killed you really easily!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Uhhhhrrr...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah! I could kill you again in my sleep! I think I might go off and kill some other kurask!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Uuuurrrrh! Hate you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you going to do about it? Eh? I totally owned you!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Hate you hate you hate you!!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think about up there?

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Think?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, what goes through your tiny stuffed head?

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Little bugs...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You have bugs living in you? Eww!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Little bugs! Stomp and crush and stomp!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah! Stomp the bugs!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Stomp crush splat!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Smash! Destroy! Crunch break tear destroy splunch! Hurt wound kill hit punch stab slash kill!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 'Splunch'? That is not a word!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: I HATE WORDS! Kill all words!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You said 'kill' twice!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: I like kill! Hur hur hur hur!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah! Kill smash destroy!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Kill smash destroy! Hur hur hur!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have the bugs done to you?

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Skitter skitter through head noise in ears behind eyes.

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: HATE THEM! Kill kill kill!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can't, you've got no feet!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: No feet...

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Hate lack of feet! Stomp lack of feet! Kill crush destroy smash!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That makes no sense! You can't destroy the absence of something!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Hate requirement to make sense! Smash it kill it destroy kill kill!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can't physically destroy an abstract concept! It's impossible!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Hate abstract concepts! Hate impossible! Kill kill kill destroy smash!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is getting both surreal and repetitive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I killed you really easily!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah! I could kill you again in my sleep! I think I might go off and kill some other kurask!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Uuuurrrrh! Hate you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you going to do about it? Eh? I totally owned you!

lines.speaker: Kurask
lines.text: Hate you hate you hate you!!!
